name: PARK NATIONAL CORP /OH/
summary: . The disclosures set forth in this Item are qualified by "ITEM 1A. RISK FACTORS" and the section captioned "FORWARD-LOOKING STATEMENTS" of this Annual Report on Form 10-K and other cautionary statements set forth elsewhere in this Annual Report on Form 10-K. General Park National Corporation (Park) is a financial holding company regulated under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956 (the Bank Holding Company Act). Founded as Park National Bank of Ohio, in Newark, Ohio, Parks legacy dates to 1908....
